title: chrysothamnus × bolanderi
intro: Chrysothamnus × bolanderi, also known as Bolander's goldenrod, is a hybrid shrub of the Chrysothamnus genus, native to the western United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. Bolander's goldenrod is used to promote overall health and well-being, with benefits including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in topical applications and salves to support skin and wound health.
